name: audio-connected

metadata.name: audio-connected
metadata.summary: Watches PulseAudio events for new sinks connected, and if the name matches the configured name, make that sink the default sink.

documentation:
# Audio Connected

Watches PulseAudio events for new sinks connected, and if the name matches the configured name, make that sink the default sink.

## Installation

Probably works best when installed with [pipx] `pipx install audio-connected` or [uv] `uv tool install audio-connected`.

To make it run on startup, you can add a XDG Autostart entry in `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/autostart` (`~/.config/autostart` by default).
An example `audio-connected.desktop` file is included in the source distribution, and can be copied to the autostart directory.

Example:

```ini
[Desktop Entry]
Version=1.5
Type=Application
Name=Audio Connected
Comment=Set EPOS ADAPT 660 headset as default sink when connected
Exec=audio-connected "EPOS ADAPT 660"
OnlyShowIn=XFCE;
StartupNotify=false
Terminal=false
Hidden=false
```

[pipx]: https://pypa.github.io/pipx/
[uv]: https://docs.astral.sh/uv/

modules.name: audio_connected
documentation: Listen for new sinks connected, and if it is the requested sink, make it the default sink.
